objective: Refactor the local React JOC shell away from a vertical panel board into a shell-zone work surface with one active main page, page navigation, universal right inspector drawer tabs, and bottom timeline.
implemented_changes: Live top navigation now switches active pages instead of scrolling to panels.
Left icon rail now maps to active pages.
Main work surface renders one active page body at a time.
Existing candidate panels are grouped into mission, queue, codex, extension, docs, gates, and receipts pages.
Right inspector now uses universal drawer tabs for receipts, context, debug, and timeline.
Docs/Packages hash route selects the Docs page instead of scrolling a monolithic board.
next_gate: Visual Proof Auditor pass with screenshot/browser validation, then decide whether this shell replaces or merges with the 8765 Codex Chat cockpit route.
